title: Lonely Heart Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Lonely Heart Spaceport'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by [[Annadale Fayde]] from her album ''[[Darkness on the Land]]''. It was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
